description: Single-document drift-aware update. sync-docs reads scoped report/commit context + the target doc + applies minimal-diff updates. For one doc at a time — not broad rewrites, not multi-doc audits.

steps.title: {{root_title}}
steps.description:
PROBLEM: doc at {{doc_path}} has drifted from current code/behavior. Reconcile minimal-diff.
SCOPE: {{doc_path}} only.
NON_GOALS: no broad rewrites; no style changes; no other docs touched; no code edits.
VALIDATION: doc accurately describes current behavior in {{context_scope}}; no orphan references to removed symbols.
ACCEPTANCE: doc is current; minimal diff (preserves existing structure where accurate).

Doc-sync chain — single-doc drift update.

steps.title: sync-docs:{{root_title}}
steps.description:
MANDATE: single-document drift-aware update. Read doc + relevant code context + recent commits/reports; apply minimal-diff edits to reconcile.
INPUTS: {{doc_path}} current content; {{context_scope}} current code; recent xt reports referencing related changes.
OUTPUTS: edited {{doc_path}} with minimal diff. Preserve structure; update content. Drift-detector pre-script runs before specialist starts.
SCOPE: {{doc_path}} only.
NON_GOALS: no broad rewrites; no style changes; no multi-doc audits; no code edits.
